atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the right foot pain as sore and swollen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he injured his right foot previously twenty years ago with a fracture and cast

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional soreness in his right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent soreness in his left ankle

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previous surgery with occasional instability

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates his current pain as eleven out of ten

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness in the entire right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has numbness in the entire right foot since the incident

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals bruising on the right foot's bottom and top, with associated swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is brisk

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong and bounding

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neuromuscular exam is intact

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-ray demonstrates dorsal displacement of the base of the second metatarsal with a 3mm separation of the first and second metatarsal bases and presence of bony fragments

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right foot pain is due to a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The injury involves the second metatarsal and the base of the fifth metatarsal

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The injury is complicated by ligamentous injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An outpatient surgical procedure is planned for tomorrow

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will receive same-day discharge

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment is scheduled in 24 hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A cast and crutches will be used for six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will progress weight-bearing gradually

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will receive counseling regarding the importance of adherence to the post-operative care plan
